Privacy & GDPR

Aug 8, 2021
Last updated on Aug 8, 2022

This website does not use cookies or make any efforts to track you.

GDPR?

The GDPR is an EU law designed to protect the personal information of it's citizens as well as regulating how this data is collected, stored & used.

https://ec.europa.eu/info/law/law-topic/data-protection_en
